options.name: Dropdown '— No match —' option
options.description: Add sentinel entry to InvoiceIngredientCorrectionPicker; on select, run unmatch flow without choosing another ingredient
implementation_sketch: Extend handleSelectCorrectionIngredient to accept null ingredientId or dedicated onRemoveMatch handler
Remove alias row IF alias exists for this line text (new deleteConfirmedAlias helper)
Delete or mark ingredient_price_history for (invoice_id, ingredient_id) if exists
Recompute ingredients.current_price from latest trusted history or prior snapshot
options.ux: good — discoverable in existing picker; consistent with 'select ingredient' mental model
options.data_integrity: medium-high if history cleanup included; low if only reject pair (orphan history remains)
options.cross_device: partial — reject pair persists to localStorage; alias/history cleanup needs Supabase writes

options.name: Dedicated 'Remove match' action
options.description: Separate link/button beside 'Correct match' for confirmed/suggested rows

New removeIngredientMatchForItem function mirroring Option A backend steps
Confirmation dialog: 'Stop linking this line to {ingredient}?'
options.ux: best — explicit intent; avoids accidental unmatch via dropdown scroll
options.data_integrity: same as A depending on cleanup depth
options.recommended_for: confirmed matches like Pepino where user intent is 'this is wrong' not 'pick another'

options.name: Block extract auto-sync for non-user-confirmed matches
options.description: Change syncOperationalIngredientCostsFromInvoiceLines to sync only confirmed-alias/override rows, not exact/semantic auto matches
implementation_sketch: Gate cost sync on isConfirmedIngredientMatch AND alias persisted OR user confirm flag
Defer price history until Confirm match or manual pick
options.risk: high — changes established extract behavior; 4 suggested + 7 confirmed VL lines would not auto-sync
options.ux: indirect — prevents future contamination but does not fix review UX for already-matched rows
options.note: Complements A/B; does not replace need for remove match on existing bad links

options.name: Reject pair only (minimal — extend existing wrong-match memory)

options.ux: acceptable for display fix; misleading if costs still poisoned
